title: ModuLab Module Manifest (v1)
description: Schema for manifest.yaml as referenced by min_core: v1 (specification chapter 4). Field set is kept in sync with backend/internal/modules/installer.go's Manifest struct in modulab-core, which is the source of truth for what is actually parsed and enforced.

name.description: Unique module identifier, lowercase with hyphens (e.g. "notes", "unifi-network"). Must be unique within the module store.

author.description: Name or organization of the module author.

license.description: SPDX license identifier (e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0, AGPL-3.0). Missing or unknown values are rejected by the registry CI.

category.description: Module store category, used for search and filtering.

tier.description: Module tier: 1 = config-driven CRUD, no handler code (Core generates the REST API and a fallback UI from the crud block), 2 = TypeScript handlers, 3 = TypeScript handlers with egress.

description.description: Map of language code to a short blurb, e.g. {"en": "...", "de": "..."}. Shown in the Module Store.

display_name.description: Map of language code to a human-readable module name, e.g. {"en": "Recipes", "de": "Rezepte"}. Falls back to name in the frontend when absent.

logo.description: Filename of an optional logo image shipped at the module's own repo root (e.g. "logo.png"). Falls back to the ModuLab mark when absent.

handler.description: Tier 2/3 only: path to the Deno entrypoint (relative path inside module.zip), e.g. handlers/index.ts. Required for tier 2/3.

egress_allowlist.description: Tier 3 only: hostnames the Deno worker may connect to, enforced by --allow-net. Empty or absent means no outbound network. Tier 2 must not declare this.

jobs.description: Tier 2/3 only: background jobs dispatched by Core's JobRunner. Cron schedules are evaluated once per minute, so anything finer than "* * * * *" is not meaningfully supported.

handler.description: Path to TypeScript handler within module.zip, e.g. jobs/report.ts.

catch_up.description: Whether missed runs should be caught up. Default: false.

storage.description: Persistent file storage under the module's own storage directory (created lazily on first upload). quota is planned, not yet enforced by Core.

quota.description: Planned, not yet enforced: soft quota, e.g. 1g.

tls_skip_verify.description: When true, scopes the worker's --unsafely-ignore-certificate-errors to exactly its egress hosts. Only for modules whose runtime destinations are private IPs with no CA-issued cert. Requires a non-empty egress_allowlist. Default: false.

dynamic_egress.description: When true, Core preserves the running worker's current egress hosts across a module code update instead of resetting to egress_allowlist. Only for modules that add hosts at runtime via egress_hosts_handler. Default: false.

egress_hosts_handler.description: Only meaningful when dynamic_egress is true. Path to a .ts module whose default export is () => Promise<string[]> — the module's own computation of its current runtime egress hosts.

resources.description: Planned, not yet enforced by Core: resource limits for the module's Deno Worker. Declaring this today has no effect.

timeout.description: Max execution time per handler call, e.g. 10s.

crud.description: Tier 1 only, required: config-driven CRUD definition. Core generates a REST API (GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE on module_{name}.{table}) and a built-in fallback UI from this - no handler code, no ui/bundle.js. The table itself is NOT auto-generated: ship migrations/001_initial.sql with the declared fields plus Core's implicit columns (id uuid, created_at/updated_at timestamptz, and created_by text when owner_scoped) - see modulab-module-sdk's GUIDE.md for the exact snippet.

table.description: Table name within this module's own module_{name} schema. Lowercase, must start with a letter, [a-z0-9_] only.

owner_scoped.description: When true, every row is restricted to the user who created it - list/get/update/delete all enforce created_by = the caller's own user ID, strictly, with no exception for any role (not even admins). When false (default), every user with access to the module can read and write every row (shared data).

name.description: Lowercase, must start with a letter, [a-z0-9_] only. Cannot collide with the implicit columns id/created_at/updated_at/created_by.

encrypted.description: Stores this field AES-256-GCM encrypted at rest (Core's MODULAB_MODULE_PII_KEY) and transparently decrypts it on read. Only supported for type "string" or "text". Encrypted values cannot be filtered or searched server-side.

source_repo.description: modulab-community entries only: repository of the module author.

manifest_path.description: modulab-community entries only: path to manifest.yaml within source_repo.

release_url.description: modulab-community entries only: URL to the module.zip artifact.
